name: Imprecision
developer: Morgan Houston, MM's Gaming Community LLC
short_description: Imprecision is a first/third person, action-adventure, rogue-lite set in The Middle Ages. In Imprecision, you play as a lone archer, Örvar, who is training to take down The Black Knights of Bjørn and their kingdom. You are determined to defeat King Bjørn the Bloodthirsty and take back what is yours.
detailed_description:
Summary:

Imprecision is a first/third person, action-adventure, rogue-lite set in the Scandinavian Middle Ages. In Imprecision, you play as a lone archer, Örvar, who is training to take down The Black Knights of Bjørn and their kingdom. King Bjørn the Bloodthirsty and The Black Knights have taken over the nation destroying a lot of the land and enslaving towns. If you are not part of the royal kingdom then you are a thrall. You are determined to take back what is yours.

How to Play:

Story Mode - Fight your way through monsters on each level, to reach the castle and take down The Black Knights of Bjørn.

Precision Mode - Precision mode is 50 levels that test your accuracy and preciseness. Shoot the targets that spawn. Each ring gives a different amount of points. Aim for the bullseye! When all targets are destroyed the level will end and you will receive a star rating for the level.

Controls:

Move: WASD/Left Stick

Look: Mouse/Right Stick

Aim: RMB/Left Trigger

Pullback/Fire: LMB/Right Trigger

Run: Shift/Left Stick Click

Jump: Space/A

Unique Selling Features:

Archery

Medieval

Voxel Art Style

Third/First Person

Precision Levels

3D Models:

Created in MagicaVoxel.

Background Music:

Medieval Loop One by Alexander Nakarada

Music promoted by free-stock-music

Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0)
